allow: Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "import fastapi, feedparser, httpx, bs4, jinja2; print\(''All imports OK''\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "from main import app; from feeds import FEEDS; print\(f''App OK, {len\(FEEDS\)} feeds configured''\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "from feeds import FEEDS; print\(f''{len\(FEEDS\)} feeds total''\); [print\(f''  {f[""name""]}''\) for f in FEEDS]")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "from main import app; from feeds import FEEDS; mags=[f for f in FEEDS if f.get\(''is_magazine''\)]; print\(f''App OK — {len\(mags\)} magazines:''\); [print\(f''  {m[""name""]}''\) for m in mags]")
